intro.title: PPT Master — AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document

profile.one: PPT Master — AI generates natively editable PPTX from any document
install_hints: **You only need Python.** Everything else is installed via `pip install -r requirements.txt`.
> **TL;DR** — Install Python, run `pip install -r requirements.txt`, and you're ready to generate presentations.
Quick version: download Python from [python.org](https://www.python.org/downloads/) → **check "Add to PATH"** during install → `pip install
